the web funnel line items array. "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The \""},{"text":"line_items","bold":true},{"text":"\" array contains these four elements:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true},{"text":" – A short description of the product"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"page_url","bold":true},{"text":" – The URL to the product page. If using funnel tracking for a membership form, provide the URL of the page where the contact last left off"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"image_url","bold":true},{"text":" – The URL of the product image"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"HTML","bold":true},{"text":" – Any additional HTML coding that will appear in the personalization."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Use Liquid scripting to access the elements of the line_items array and iterate through each set of elements."}]}]
